# Issue #999: Test fixture

## Context

This is a test fixture for workflow-chain.bats.

## Implementation Plan

```json
{
  "finish_issue_on_complete": true,
  "steps": [
    {
      "id": "S001",
      "title": "Add parser module",
      "status": "done",
      "done_when": "Parser exported and passing unit tests",
      "depends_on": [],
      "files": ["src/parser.ts", "src/index.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Create parseInput() function in src/parser.ts",
        "Export from src/index.ts barrel file"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S002",
      "title": "Wire parser into handler",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "done_when": "Handler calls parseInput()",
      "depends_on": ["S001"],
      "files": ["src/server.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Import parseInput from src/parser.ts",
        "Call parseInput() in handleRequest()"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S003",
      "title": "Add integration tests",
      "status": "pending",
      "done_when": "All new functions have test coverage",
      "depends_on": ["S002"],
      "files": ["src/__tests__/parser.test.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Add tests for parseInput()",
        "Cover happy path and edge cases"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
